title: Department of Coaching Education - About The Internship
content:
Department of Coaching Education - About The Internship

Internship and observation studies are carried out in order to ensure that students develop in the fields of specialty sports. Appointments are made for certain periods in sports centers suitable for their specialization. Activities are carried out to improve coaching skills. Students studying in our department have the opportunity to observe the practices of expert trainers in the fields of sports.

This content was updated on 29/01/2026.
